description: The expression `(remote.repo_pr_loaded.get(agent_repo) is True) if agent_repo else False` is duplicated at lines 142 and 208, in enrich_snapshot_with_github_data and fetch_board_snapshot respectively. This encapsulates a specific domain concept (checking whether an agent's repo's PR data was successfully loaded) and could be extracted into a small helper function. However, it is only two occurrences of a simple one-liner.
